note: Generated from the script/ tree and the Makefile. Do not edit by hand; run `npm run docs:catalog`.

primitives.name: AdoptToken
primitives.description: Adopts an externally deployed token (and optionally its pool) into the address registry, so contracts this repo did NOT deploy resolve exactly like the ones it did (the zero-export `active.<role>` ladder).

primitives.name: RolesCheck
primitives.description: **`make roles-check CHAIN=<name>` - READ-ONLY reconcile of the declared `roles{}` against the live chain.** It never writes a file and never broadcasts; the only outputs are the aligned [PASS]/[FAIL]/[WARN]/[SKIP] lines from `RolesAuditor` and the exit status.

primitives.name: SnapshotChain
primitives.description: **`make snapshot-chain CHAIN=<name>` - backfill the DECLARED authority state FROM chain.** Reads the live role surface (owner/defaultAdmin/getCCIPAdmin/hasRole/TAR getTokenConfig/ dual-generation pool admins/getAllAuthorizedCallers/getAllowList/...) through `RolesSnapshot` and writes the `roles{}` subtree of `project/<selectorName>.json` (preserve-and-replace, the same single-subtree pattern as the `ccip{}` sync).

primitives.name: SyncCcipConfig
primitives.description: The config-sync entrypoints: everything that generates, refreshes, or drift-checks a `config/chains/<name>.json` file from the live CCIP REST API v2.

primitives.name: VerifyChain
primitives.description: The layered chain-config doctor.

primitives.name: DeployAdvancedPoolHooks
primitives.description: Optional script to deploy AdvancedPoolHooks for enhanced token pool security

primitives.name: GetAdvancedPoolHooks
primitives.description: Reads and displays the AdvancedPoolHooks contract address currently attached to a token pool.

primitives.name: GetAllowList
primitives.description: Script to fetch and print the allowlist from an AdvancedPoolHooks contract Usage: POOL_HOOKS=0x... forge script script/configure/allowlist/GetAllowList.s.sol --rpc-url $ETHEREUM_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL --account $KEYSTORE_NAME /

primitives.name: IsAllowListed
primitives.description: Script to check if an address is allowlisted in an AdvancedPoolHooks contract Usage: POOL_HOOKS=0x...

primitives.name: UpdateAdvancedPoolHooks
primitives.description: Script to update the AdvancedPoolHooks address for a deployed TokenPool

primitives.name: UpdateAllowList
primitives.description: Script to update the allowlist for a TokenPool or AdvancedPoolHooks

primitives.name: GetAuthorizedCallers
primitives.description: Script to fetch and print the authorized callers from an AdvancedPoolHooks or ERC20LockBox contract Usage: POOL_HOOKS=0x... forge script script/configure/authorized-callers/GetAuthorizedCallers.s.sol --rpc-url $ETHEREUM_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL --account $KEYSTORE_NAME LOCK_BOX=0x... forge script script/configure/authorized-callers/GetAuthorizedCallers.s.sol --rpc-url $ETHEREUM_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL --account $KEYSTORE_NAME Environment variables: POOL_HOOKS -- address of an AdvancedPoolHooks contract (one of POOL_HOOKS or LOCK_BOX required) LOCK_BOX -- address of an ERC20LockBox contract (one of POOL_HOOKS or LOCK_BOX required) /

primitives.name: UpdateAuthorizedCallers
primitives.description: Script to add or remove authorized callers on an AdvancedPoolHooks or ERC20LockBox contract

primitives.name: GetCCVConfig
primitives.description: Reads and displays the CCV (Cross-Chain Verifier) configuration for a token pool: every configured remote lane's four verifier arrays plus the pool-global additional-CCV threshold.

primitives.name: UpdateCCVConfig
primitives.description: Applies CCV (Cross-Chain Verifier) configuration to a token pool's AdvancedPoolHooks: the four per-lane verifier arrays and/or the pool-global additional-CCV threshold.

primitives.name: GetDynamicConfig
primitives.description: Reads and displays the dynamic configuration of a TokenPool.

primitives.name: SetDynamicConfig
primitives.description: Updates the dynamic configuration of a TokenPool (router, rateLimitAdmin, feeAdmin).

primitives.name: GetTokenTransferFeeConfig
primitives.description: Reads and displays the token transfer fee configuration for a token pool on a given destination lane.

primitives.name: UpdateTokenTransferFeeConfig
primitives.description: Applies token transfer fee configuration updates to a token pool on a given destination lane.

primitives.name: GetFinalityConfig
primitives.description: Reads and displays the allowed finality configuration on a TokenPool.

primitives.name: SetFinalityConfig
primitives.description: Sets the allowed finality configuration on a TokenPool, and optionally updates rate limits for the fast finality bucket on a specific remote chain lane.

primitives.name: GetLockBox
primitives.description: Reads and displays the ERC20LockBox contract address currently attached to a LockReleaseTokenPool.

primitives.name: GetRebalancer
primitives.description: Reads and displays the rebalancer of a v1.x LockRelease token pool (`getRebalancer`).

primitives.name: ProvideLiquidity
primitives.description: Provides lock/release liquidity to a v1.x LockRelease token pool (`provideLiquidity`).

primitives.name: SetRebalancer
primitives.description: Sets the rebalancer on a v1.x LockRelease token pool (`setRebalancer`, onlyOwner).

primitives.name: WithdrawLiquidity
primitives.description: Withdraws lock/release liquidity from a v1.x LockRelease token pool (`withdrawLiquidity`).

primitives.name: GetCurrentRateLimits
primitives.description: Reads and displays the current rate limiter state for a TokenPool, compatible with v1 and v2 pools.

primitives.name: UpdateRateLimiters
primitives.description: Updates rate limiter configuration on a TokenPool, compatible with both v1 and v2 pools.

primitives.name: RemoveChain
primitives.description: Fully unsupports a remote chain on the source TokenPool: removes the chain selector and deletes its remote-chain config (pools, remote token, rate limits).

primitives.name: AddRemotePool
primitives.description: Adds a remote pool address to a TokenPool for a given remote chain.

primitives.name: GetRemotePools
primitives.description: Reads and displays the remote pool addresses configured on a TokenPool for a given remote chain.

primitives.name: RemoveRemotePool
primitives.description: Removes a remote pool address from a TokenPool for a given remote chain.

primitives.name: DeployBurnMintTokenPool
primitives.description: Deploys a BurnMint token pool for a token and records it in the address registry.

primitives.name: DeployERC20LockBox
primitives.description: Script to deploy an ERC20LockBox for use with a LockReleaseTokenPool

primitives.name: DeployLockReleaseTokenPool
primitives.description: Deploys a LockRelease token pool (paired with an ERC20 LockBox) and records it in the registry.

primitives.name: DeployToken
primitives.description: Deploys a cross-chain ERC20 token (CrossChainToken) and records it in the address registry.

primitives.name: PreflightTransfer
primitives.description: Preflights a token transfer before any real send by simulating both pool legs against live chain state: the source pool's `lockOrBurn`, then the destination pool's `releaseOrMint` fed the exact `destPoolData` the source leg produced.

primitives.name: DeploySafe
primitives.description: Deploys a Safe from the canonical Safe v1.4.1 stack: `SafeProxyFactory.createProxyWithNonce(SafeL2, setup(...), saltNonce)`.

primitives.name: ExecuteBatch
primitives.description: Composes several independently emitted Safe batches into ONE Safe meta-transaction.

primitives.name: VerifyRoles
primitives.description: **The privileged-role audit reader (read-only)** - prints the CURRENT holder of every authority slot for a token / pool / lockbox / hooks set.

primitives.name: DepositToLockBox
primitives.description: Script to deposit tokens into an ERC20LockBox

primitives.name: GetFeeTokenBalances
primitives.description: Displays the fee token balances currently held by a token pool.

primitives.name: MintTokens
primitives.description: Mints tokens to a receiver (requires the signer to hold the token's minter role).

primitives.name: WithdrawFeeTokens
primitives.description: Withdraws accrued fee token balances from a token pool to a specified recipient.

primitives.name: WithdrawFromLockBox
primitives.description: Script to withdraw tokens from an ERC20LockBox

primitives.name: AcceptAdminRole
primitives.description: Accepts the pending administrator role for a token in the TokenAdminRegistry (step 2 of the two-step claim; the signer must be the pending administrator set by ClaimAdmin).

primitives.name: ApplyChainUpdates
primitives.description: Configures cross-chain lanes on the source TokenPool by calling applyChainUpdates.

primitives.name: ClaimAdmin
primitives.description: Registers the token administrator in the TokenAdminRegistry, auto-detecting the claim path (getCCIPAdmin, then owner, then AccessControl DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) in that precedence.

primitives.name: ClaimAndAcceptAdmin
primitives.description: Claims AND accepts the CCIP token admin as ONE atomic registration pair - the claim sets the executing account as the registry's pending administrator, so the accept in the same batch succeeds.

primitives.name: GetSupportedChains
primitives.description: Reads and displays all remote chains supported by a TokenPool.

primitives.name: GetTokenConfig
primitives.description: Reads and displays TokenAdminRegistry.getTokenConfig(tokenAddress) for a token.

primitives.name: GetTypeAndVersion
primitives.description: Reads and displays the typeAndVersion string from any contract implementing ITypeAndVersion.

primitives.name: SetPool
primitives.description: Points the TokenAdminRegistry at the token's pool, activating the token for cross-chain transfers.

primitives.name: GrantTokenRole
primitives.description: Grants a token role (minter / burner / burnMintAdmin) to a holder, template-dispatched: AccessControl templates (`crosschain`, `burnmint`) get `grantRole` with the token's resolved role id; the Ownable `factory` template gets `grantMintRole`/`grantBurnRole`.

primitives.name: RevokeTokenRole
primitives.description: Revokes a token role (minter / burner / burnMintAdmin) from a holder, template-dispatched exactly like `GrantTokenRole`: `revokeRole` on AccessControl templates, `revokeMintRole`/`revokeBurnRole` on the Ownable `factory` template.

primitives.name: SetCCIPAdmin
primitives.description: Sets the token's CCIP admin (`setCCIPAdmin`, one-step, no accept).

primitives.name: TransferTokenAdmin
primitives.description: Moves the token's TOP-LEVEL admin (its template's own mechanism).

primitives.name: AcceptOwnership
primitives.description: Completes a two-step ownership transfer initiated by TransferOwnership for any Ownable contract (a token pool, pool hooks, or a lockbox).

primitives.name: TransferOwnership
primitives.description: Initiates a two-step ownership transfer for any Ownable contract (a token pool, pool hooks, or a lockbox).

primitives.name: TransferTokenAdminRole
primitives.description: Initiates a transfer of the token admin role to a new address.

makeTargets.help: List the available targets
Check the required tools are installed (forge, curl, jq)
List the CCIP API testnet catalog vs local configs (FILTER=<term> narrows)
Generate config/chains/<CHAIN>.json from the live API (CHAIN= and SELECTOR= required)

Append a lanes{} policy entry LOCAL -> REMOTE (LOCAL= REMOTE= CAPACITY= RATE= required; INBOUND_CAPACITY= + INBOUND_RATE= add the inbound block; BOTH=1 adds the reciprocal; GROUP= scopes to a token group)

Remove a lanes{} policy entry LOCAL -> REMOTE from the declaration (LOCAL= REMOTE= required; BOTH=1 removes the reciprocal; GROUP= scopes to a token group; on-chain removal via RemoveChain, or RemoveRemotePool for a single pool, is a separate step)
Adopt an externally deployed token into project/[<GROUP>/]<CHAIN>.json (EVM: CHAIN= TOKEN= [TOKEN_POOL=]; non-EVM: CHAIN= TOKEN_B58= [POOL_B58=]; GROUP= for a second token)
Refresh <CHAIN>'s ccip{} block from the live API (CHAIN= required)
Fetch + log <CHAIN>'s ccip{} from the API without writing (CHAIN= required)
Refresh every configured chain (non-EVM chains SKIP; failures are collected)
Repair canonical JSON: config/chains/*.json (jq -S + trailing newline) AND project files, all groups (jq -S, NO trailing newline)
Remove gitignored test-scratch fixtures (zz-scratch-*, zz-tt-*, local-*) from config/chains/, project/ and history/
Read-only drift check (CHAIN= optional; pass/fail only - CI uses the script for 0/1/2)
Print the forge verifier flags composed from config/chains/<CHAIN>.json (CHAIN= required)
Source-verify an already-deployed contract on <CHAIN>'s explorer backend (CHAIN= ADDRESS= CONTRACT= required; CONSTRUCTOR_ARGS= optional, else guessed via the RPC)
Layered verification of one chain's config (CHAIN= required; GROUP= scopes to one token group)

Preflight a token transfer before sending: simulate source lockOrBurn + dest releaseOrMint against live state, GO/NO-GO (SOURCE_CHAIN= DEST_CHAIN= AMOUNT= RECEIVER= required; opt SOURCE_POOL= DEST_POOL= ORIGINAL_SENDER= REQUESTED_FINALITY=; read-only, no keystore)

Deploy a cross-chain token on <CHAIN> (CHAIN= + KEYSTORE_NAME= required; token params via env TOKEN_NAME= TOKEN_SYMBOL= ...; VERIFY=1 source-verifies; FORCE_REDEPLOY=1 overrides the redeploy guard; GROUP= scopes to a token group)
Deploy a BurnMint token pool on <CHAIN> (CHAIN= + KEYSTORE_NAME= required; token resolved from the registry, else TOKEN=; opt POOL_HOOKS=; VERIFY=1; FORCE_REDEPLOY=1; GROUP= scopes to a token group)

Deploy an ERC20 LockBox on <CHAIN> for the LockRelease liquidity model (CHAIN= + KEYSTORE_NAME= required; token from the registry, else TOKEN=; opt AUTHORIZED_CALLERS=; VERIFY=1; GROUP= scopes to a token group)

Deploy a LockRelease token pool on <CHAIN> (CHAIN= + KEYSTORE_NAME= required; token + lock box from the registry, else TOKEN= LOCK_BOX=; opt POOL_HOOKS=; VERIFY=1; FORCE_REDEPLOY=1; GROUP= scopes to a token group)

Guided deploy: add-chain -> deploy-token -> deploy-pool -> doctor (CHAIN= SELECTOR= + KEYSTORE_NAME= required; token params + VERIFY= via env). Register, set-pool, and wire-lane come next - see docs/workflows/greenfield-deploy.md; a green run means deployed, not yet cross-chain-live
Backfill the declared roles{} authority block FROM chain (CHAIN= required; GROUP= scopes to one token group; opt: TOKEN= TOKEN_POOL= TAR= SCAN_FROM_BLOCK=)
READ-ONLY reconcile of a chain's declared roles{} vs the live chain (CHAIN= optional; GROUP= scopes to one token group; pass/fail only - CI uses the script for 0/1/2)
READ-ONLY reconcile of every chain that declares roles{}, across all token groups (exit contract = script/config/roles-check.sh)
